'''ân-j-b-w''' ('''kanajbewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:whoo|whoo]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-j-b-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whoo|whoo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-j-b-w
|-
! Lemma
| kanajbewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinajbewoko|thinajbewoko]] || [[word:jinajbewoko|jinajbewoko]] || [[word:shinajbewoko|shinajbewoko]] || [[word:kinajbewoko|kinajbewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunajbewoko|thuthunajbewoko]] || [[word:jujunajbewoko|jujunajbewoko]] || [[word:shushunajbewoko|shushunajbewoko]] || [[word:kukunajbewoko|kukunajbewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunajbewoko|thunajbewoko]] || [[word:junajbewoko|junajbewoko]] || [[word:shunajbewoko|shunajbewoko]] || [[word:kunajbewoko|kunajbewoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonajbewoko|thonajbewoko]] || [[word:jonajbewoko|jonajbewoko]] || [[word:shonajbewoko|shonajbewoko]] || [[word:konajbewoko|konajbewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚnajbewoko|thĂŚnajbewoko]] || [[word:jĂŚnajbewoko|jĂŚnajbewoko]] || [[word:shĂŚnajbewoko|shĂŚnajbewoko]] || [[word:kĂŚnajbewoko|kĂŚnajbewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanajbewoko|thathanajbewoko]] || [[word:jajanajbewoko|jajanajbewoko]] || [[word:shashanajbewoko|shashanajbewoko]] || [[word:kakanajbewoko|kakanajbewoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanajbewoko|thanajbewoko]] || [[word:janajbewoko|janajbewoko]] || [[word:shanajbewoko|shanajbewoko]] || [[word:kanajbewoko|kanajbewoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
